rationale: The current best already exploits late projection roundtrips plus projection EMA, but the largest remaining quantized matrices are the unkept `mlp.fc.weight` tensors. This change keeps the winning endgame intact and adds a new family-specific quant-aware rebalance: once late quant-aware mode starts, Muon updates on `mlp.fc.weight` are damped further than other matrices. The hypothesis is that these wide expansion matrices are still moving enough in the last ~50s to hurt their final per-row int8 fit, so reducing only their late-step velocity should lower roundtrip distortion without sacrificing the projection-focused gains that produced run 0033.
title: Late MLP-FC LR Damping With Projection EMA
